searchTopics() metodunun içinde $db->safesql() kullandığından emin olun. // Eğer metodunuzda safesql yoksa buraya $q = $db->safesql($q); ekleyin. $topics = $Forum->searchTopics($q, $page, $per_page); $total_topics = $Forum->countSearchTopics($q); $topics_list_html = ''; $noavatar = $config['http_home_url'] . 'templates/' . $config['skin'] . '/dleimages/noavatar.png'; if(empty($topics)) { $topics_list_html = '
Aramanızla eşleşen bir konu bulunamadı.
'; } else { foreach($topics as $t) { // DÜZELTME: ID'ler intval ile sarıldı $t_url = $config['http_home_url'] . 'index.php?do=forum&action=topic&id=' . intval($t['id']); $t_title = htmlspecialchars($t['title']); $t_user = htmlspecialchars($t['username'] ?: 'Misafir'); // Tarih Güvenliği $t_date = (isset($t['date']) && strtotime($t['date']) > 0) ? date('d.m.Y', strtotime($t['date'])) : '-'; $t_views = number_format(intval($t['views'] ?? 0)); $t_replies = number_format(intval($t['replies'] ?? 0)); $last_user = htmlspecialchars($t['last_username'] ?? $t_user); // Son Mesaj Tarihi Güvenliği $last_date_raw = $t['last_post_date'] ?? ($t['lp_date'] ?? $t['date']); $last_date = ($last_date_raw && strtotime($last_date_raw) > 0) ? date('d.m.Y H:i', strtotime($last_date_raw)) : '-'; // DÜZELTME: XSS Açığı Kapatıldı $last_avatar = !empty($t['last_user_avatar']) ? $config['http_home_url'] . 'uploads/fotos/' . htmlspecialchars($t['last_user_avatar']) : $noavatar; // Durum ikonu (Varsayılan ile başlat) $status_icon = ''; if(!empty($t['is_pinned']) && !empty($t['is_locked'])) { $status_icon = ''; } elseif(!empty($t['is_pinned'])) { $status_icon = ''; } elseif(!empty($t['is_locked'])) { $status_icon = ''; } $topics_list_html .= '
' . $status_icon . '
' . $t_title . '

' . $t_replies . '
Cevap
' . $t_views . '
İzlenme
' . $last_user . '
' . $last_date . '
'; } } $base_url = $config['http_home_url'] . 'index.php?do=forum&action=search&q=' . urlencode($q); $pagination = $Forum->pagination($total_topics, $per_page, $page, $base_url); $tpl->load_template('forum/category.tpl'); $tpl->set('{cat_name}', 'Arama Sonuçları: ' . htmlspecialchars($q)); $tpl->set('{cat_desc}', number_format(intval($total_topics)) . " - Forum"; ?>

<?php
if(!defined('DATALIFEENGINE')) die("Hacking attempt!");

// 1. Giriş ve Yetki Kontrolü
if(!$is_logged) {
    msgbox("Hata", "Konu açmak için giriş yapmalısınız.");
    return;
}

if(!$Forum->canDo('create_topic')) {
    msgbox("Hata", "Bu kategoride konu açma yetkiniz yok.");
    return;
}

 $cat_id = isset($_REQUEST['cat_id']) ? intval($_REQUEST['cat_id']) : 0;
 $cat = $Forum->getCatById($cat_id);

if(!$cat) {
    msgbox("Hata", "Geçersiz kategori seçimi.");
    return;
}

 $error = '';
// Form verilerini korumak için değişkenler
 $post_title_val = '';
 $post_content_val = '';

// 2. Form Gönderimi ve CSRF Kontrolü
if(isset($_POST['submit_topic'])) {
    
    // GÜVENLİK: CSRF Token Doğrulaması
    if(!$Forum->verifyCsrf($_POST['csrf_token'] ?? '')) {
        $error = "Güvenlik doğrulaması başarısız! Sayfayı yenileyip tekrar deneyin.";
    } else {
        // PHP 8 ZIRHI: $_POST degerleri array gelirse Fatal Error
        $raw_title   = isset($_POST['topic_title']) && is_string($_POST['topic_title']) ? $_POST['topic_title'] : '';
        $raw_content = isset($_POST['comments']) && is_string($_POST['comments']) ? $_POST['comments'] : (isset($_POST['topic_content']) && is_string($_POST['topic_content']) ? $_POST['topic_content'] : '');
        $title   = trim(strip_tags($raw_title));
        $content = trim($raw_content);
        
        // Temizlenmiş içerik uzunluğu kontrolü
        $clean_content = trim(strip_tags(html_entity_decode($content, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8')));
        $clean_content = str_replace(' ', '', $clean_content);

        // DÜZELTME: Türkçe karakter ve yazım hataları giderildi
        if(mb_strlen($title) < 3) {
            $error = "Başlık en az 3 karakter olmalı!";
        } elseif(mb_strlen($title) > 255) {
            $error = "Başlık çok uzun!";
        } elseif(mb_strlen($clean_content) < 10) {
            $error = "İçerik en az 10 karakter olmalı!";
        } else {
            $result = $Forum->createTopic($cat_id, $title, $content);
            if(isset($result['error'])) {
                $error = $result['error'];
            } else {
                // DÜZELTME: Header Injection / Open Redirect riski engellendi
                header("Location: " . $config['http_home_url'] . "index.php?do=forum&action=topic&id=" . intval($result['topic_id']));
                exit;
            }
        }
        
        // Hata varsa form verilerini geri yükle (UX)
        if($error) {
            $post_title_val = htmlspecialchars($title);
            // Sadece BBCode editörü için escape edilen versiyon saklanır
            $post_content_val = htmlspecialchars($content);
        }
    }
}

// 3. Editor Hazırlığı
if ( !class_exists( 'HTMLPurifier_Config' ) ) {
    include_once (DLEPlugins::Check( ENGINE_DIR . '/classes/htmlpurifier/HTMLPurifier.standalone.php' ));
}

include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/classes/parse.class.php'));
 $parse = new ParseFilter();
 $editor_html = "";

 $onload_before = isset($onload_scripts) ? count($onload_scripts) : 0;

if($config['allow_comments_wysiwyg'] == 1) {
    include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/editor/comments.php'));
    $editor_html = $wysiwyg;
} else {
    include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/editor/bbcode.php'));
    $editor_html = $bb_code;
}

 $onload_after = isset($onload_scripts) ? count($onload_scripts) : 0;
if($onload_after > $onload_before) {
    $tinymce_url = $config['http_home_url'] . 'public/editor/tiny_mce/tinymce.min.js';
    $dlebutton_url = $config['http_home_url'] . 'public/editor/tiny_mce/plugins/dlebutton/plugin.min.js';
    $editor_html .= '<script>if(typeof tinyMCE==="undefined"){var s=document.createElement("script");s.src="' . $tinymce_url . '";s.onload=function(){';
    $editor_html .= 'var s2=document.createElement("script");s2.src="' . $dlebutton_url . '";s2.onload=function(){';
    for($si = $onload_before; $si < $onload_after; $si++) {
        $editor_html .= $onload_scripts[$si];
    }
    $editor_html .= '};document.head.appendChild(s2);';
    $editor_html .= '};document.head.appendChild(s);}else{';
    for($si = $onload_before; $si < $onload_after; $si++) {
        $editor_html .= $onload_scripts[$si];
    }
    $editor_html .= '}</script>';
}

// DÜZELTME: Editör Türüne Göre İçerik Geri Yükleme (UX BUG FIX)
global $text; 
if($error) {
    if($config['allow_comments_wysiwyg'] == 1) {
        // WYSIWYG (TinyMCE) süzülmemiş (ham) HTML ister
        $text = $content; 
    } else {
        // BBCode editörü escape edilmiş metin ister
        $text = $post_content_val; 
    }
} else {
    $text = '';
}

// 4. Template Çıktısı
 $tpl->load_template('forum/new_topic.tpl');
 $tpl->set('{cat_name}', htmlspecialchars($cat['name']));
 $tpl->set('{cat_id}', $cat_id);
 $tpl->set('{editor}', $editor_html);
 $tpl->set('{title_val}', $post_title_val);
 $tpl->set('{csrf_token}', $Forum->csrfToken());
 $tpl->set('{SITEURL}', $config['http_home_url']);

if($error) {
    $tpl->set('[error]', ''); $tpl->set('[/error]', '');
    $tpl->set('{error}', $error);
} else {
    $tpl->set_block("'\\[error\\](.*?)\\[/error\\]'is", "");
}

 $tpl->compile('content'); 
 $tpl->clear();

define('KSEARCH', false);
define('RSSPARSE', false);
 $metatags['title'] = "Yeni Konu Aç: " . htmlspecialchars($cat['name']) . " - " . $config['home_title'];
?>

<?php
if(!defined('DATALIFEENGINE')) die("Hacking attempt!");

class Forum {

    protected $db, $user, $config;

    public function __construct($db, $user, $config) {
        $this->db     = $db;
        $this->user   = $user;
        $this->config = $config;
    }

    public function makeSlug($title) {
        return totranslit($title, true, false);
    }

    public function isLogged() {
        return !empty($this->user['user_id']);
    }

    public function getUserId() {
        return intval($this->user['user_id']);
    }

    public function getOnlineCount() {
        $time = time() - 300; 
        $r = $this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE lastdate > '$time'");
        return intval($r['c']);
    }

    public function canDo($perm) {
        $group = intval($this->user['user_group']);
        if($group == 1) return true;
        $allowed = [
            'view_forum'   => [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7],
            'create_topic' => [1, 2, 3, 4, 5],
            'reply_topic'  => [1, 2, 3, 4, 5],
            'edit_own'     => [1, 2, 3, 4, 5],
            'delete_own'   => [1, 2, 3, 4, 5],
            'moderate'     => [1, 2],
            'send_pm'      => [1, 2, 3, 4, 5],
            'lock_topic'   => [1, 2],
            'pin_topic'    => [1, 2],
            'delete_any'   => [1, 2],
        ];
        return isset($allowed[$perm]) && in_array($group, $allowed[$perm]);
    }

    public function csrfToken() {
        global $dle_login_hash;
        return $dle_login_hash;
    }

    public function verifyCsrf($token) {
        global $dle_login_hash;
        if(empty($token) || empty($dle_login_hash)) return false;
        return hash_equals((string)$dle_login_hash, (string)$token);
    }

    public function getSetting($name) {
        $row = $this->db->super_query("SELECT value FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_settings WHERE name = '" . $this->db->safesql($name) . "'");
        return $row ? $row['value'] : null;
    }

    public function getCats($parent_id = 0) {
        $cacheKey = "forum_cats_" . intval($parent_id);
        $cached = dle_cache($cacheKey, $this->config['skin']);
        if($cached) return unserialize($cached);
        $pid = intval($parent_id);
        $cats = $this->db->super_query(
            "SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats WHERE parent_id = '$pid' ORDER BY posi ASC",
            true
        );
        create_cache($cacheKey, serialize($cats), $this->config['skin']);
        return $cats;
    }

    public function getCatBySlug($slug) {
        // DÜZELTME: Slug zaten category.php tarafindan preg_replace ile temizleniyor.
        // safesql ile double escape yapilmaz, sadece dogrudan sorguya eklenir.
        return $this->db->super_query("SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats WHERE alt_name = '" . $this->db->safesql($slug) . "'");
    }

    public function getCatById($id) {
        $id = intval($id);
        return $this->db->super_query("SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats WHERE id = '$id'");
    }

    public function updateCatStats($cat_id) {
        $cat_id = intval($cat_id);
        $tc = $this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics WHERE cat_id = '$cat_id' AND is_deleted = '0'");
        $pc = $this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts p JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t ON t.id = p.topic_id WHERE t.cat_id = '$cat_id' AND p.is_deleted = '0'");
        $last = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics WHERE cat_id = '$cat_id' AND is_deleted = '0' ORDER BY last_post_date DESC LIMIT 1");
        $last_id = $last ? $last['id'] : 0;
        $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats SET topic_count = '{$tc['c']}', post_count = '{$pc['c']}', last_topic_id = '$last_id' WHERE id = '$cat_id'");
        clear_cache("forum_cats_0");
        clear_cache("forum_cats_" . $cat_id);
    }

    public function getTopics($cat_id, $page = 1, $per_page = 25) {
        $cat_id   = intval($cat_id);
        $per_page = intval($per_page);
        $offset   = (max(1, intval($page)) - 1) * $per_page;
        return $this->db->super_query(
            "SELECT t.*, u.name as username, u.foto as avatar,
             lp.date as lp_date, lu.name as last_username, lu.foto as last_user_avatar
             FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t
             LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = t.user_id
             LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts lp ON lp.id = t.last_post_id
             LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users lu ON lu.user_id = t.last_user_id
             WHERE t.cat_id = '$cat_id' AND t.is_deleted = '0'
             ORDER BY t.is_pinned DESC, t.last_post_date DESC
             LIMIT $offset, $per_page",
            true
        );
    }

    public function countTopics($cat_id) {
        $cat_id = intval($cat_id);
        $r = $this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics WHERE cat_id = '$cat_id' AND is_deleted = '0'");
        return intval($r['c']);
    }

    public function searchTopics($query, $page = 1, $per_page = 25) {
        $query    = $this->db->safesql(trim($query));
        $per_page = intval($per_page);
        $offset   = (max(1, intval($page)) - 1) * $per_page;
        return $this->db->super_query(
            "SELECT t.*, u.name as username, u.foto as avatar,
             lp.date as lp_date, lu.name as last_username, lu.foto as last_user_avatar
             FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t
             LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = t.user_id
             LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts lp ON lp.id = t.last_post_id
             LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users lu ON lu.user_id = t.last_user_id
             WHERE (t.title LIKE '%$query%') AND t.is_deleted = '0'
             ORDER BY t.last_post_date DESC
             LIMIT $offset, $per_page",
            true
        );
    }

    public function countSearchTopics($query) {
        $query = $this->db->safesql(trim($query));
        // DÜZELTME: Eksik 't' alias'ı eklendi.
        $r = $this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t WHERE (t.title LIKE '%$query%') AND t.is_deleted = '0'");
        return intval($r['c']);
    }

    public function getTopicBySlug($slug) {
        $slug = $this->db->safesql($slug);
        return $this->db->super_query(
            "SELECT t.*, u.name as username, u.foto as avatar, c.name as cat_name, c.alt_name as cat_slug
             FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t
             LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = t.user_id
             LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats c ON c.id = t.cat_id
             WHERE t.alt_name = '$slug' AND t.is_deleted = '0'"
        );
    }

    public function getTopicById($id) {
        $id = intval($id);
        return $this->db->super_query(
            "SELECT t.*, u.name as username, u.foto as avatar, c.name as cat_name, c.alt_name as cat_slug,
             lu.name as last_username, lu.foto as last_user_avatar
             FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t
             LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = t.user_id
             LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users lu ON lu.user_id = t.last_user_id
             LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats c ON c.id = t.cat_id
             WHERE t.id = '$id' AND t.is_deleted = '0'"
        );
    }

    public function createTopic($cat_id, $title, $text) {
        if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => 'Giriş yapmanız gerekiyor!'];
        if(!$this->canDo('create_topic')) return ['error' => 'Yetkiniz yok!'];

        $cat_id   = intval($cat_id);
        $title    = trim($title);
        $text     = trim($text);
        $user_id  = $this->getUserId();

        if(mb_strlen($title) < 3)   return ['error' => 'Başlık çok kısa!'];
        if(mb_strlen($title) > 255) return ['error' => 'Başlık çok uzun!'];
        $clean_text = trim(strip_tags(html_entity_decode($text, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8')));
        if(mb_strlen($clean_text) < 10) return ['error' => 'Mesaj çok kısa!'];

        $flood_time = intval($this->getSetting('flood_time') ?: 30);
        $last_topic = $this->db->super_query("SELECT date FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics WHERE user_id = '$user_id' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1");
        if($last_topic && (time() - strtotime($last_topic['date'])) < $flood_time) {
            return ['error' => "Çok hızlı konu açıyorsunuz! $flood_time saniye bekleyin."];
        }

        // DÜZELTME: Slug HAM metinden alınıyor
        $slug = $this->makeSlug($title);
        $exists = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics WHERE alt_name = '$slug'");
        if($exists) $slug .= '-' . time();

        // DÜZELTME: Başlıkta ÇİFT ENCODE önleniyor, sadece safesql kullanılıyor. 
        $title_db = $this->db->safesql($title);
        $text_db  = $this->db->safesql($text);

        $ip = $this->db->safesql($_SERVER['REMOTE_ADDR']);

        $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics (cat_id, title, alt_name, user_id, date, last_post_date) VALUES ('$cat_id', '$title_db', '$slug', '$user_id', NOW(), NOW())");
        $topic_id = $this->db->insert_id();

        $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts (topic_id, user_id, text, ip, date) VALUES ('$topic_id', '$user_id', '$text_db', '$ip', NOW())");
        $post_id = $this->db->insert_id();

        $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET last_post_id = '$post_id', last_user_id = '$user_id' WHERE id = '$topic_id'");

        $this->addPoints($user_id, intval($this->getSetting('points_new_topic') ?: 10));
        $this->updatePostCount($user_id);
        $this->updateCatStats($cat_id);
        clear_cache("forum_topics_" . $cat_id);
        
        // DÜZELTME: Mentionlar HAM text üzerinden aranmalı
        $this->parseMentions($text, $topic_id, $post_id);

        return ['success' => true, 'topic_id' => $topic_id, 'slug' => $slug];
    }

    public function lockTopic($topic_id, $state = 1) {
        if(!$this->canDo('lock_topic')) return false;
        $topic_id = intval($topic_id);
        $state    = $state ? 1 : 0;
        $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET is_locked = '$state' WHERE id = '$topic_id'");
        $this->logAction($state ? 'lock_topic' : 'unlock_topic', $topic_id);
        return true;
    }

    public function pinTopic($topic_id, $state = 1) {
        if(!$this->canDo('pin_topic')) return false;
        $topic_id = intval($topic_id);
        $state    = $state ? 1 : 0;
        $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET is_pinned = '$state' WHERE id = '$topic_id'");
        $this->logAction($state ? 'pin_topic' : 'unpin_topic', $topic_id);
        return true;
    }

    public function deleteTopic($topic_id) {
        if(!$this->canDo('delete_any')) return false;
        $topic_id = intval($topic_id);
        $topic    = $this->getTopicById($topic_id);
        if(!$topic) return false;
        $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET is_deleted = '1' WHERE id = '$topic_id'");
        $this->logAction('delete_topic', $topic_id);
        $this->updateCatStats($topic['cat_id']);
        return true;
    }

    public function incrementViews($topic_id) {
        // NOT: Bu metod artik topic.php tarafinda cookie tabanli kontrolle degistirildi.
        // Burada tutulmasi geriye donuk uyumluluk icindir. Yeni kod cookie kullaniyor.
        $topic_id = intval($topic_id);
        $ip       = $_SERVER['REMOTE_ADDR'];
        $cacheKey = 'forum_view_' . $topic_id . '_' . md5($ip);
        if (!dle_cache($cacheKey, $this->config['skin'])) {
            $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = '$topic_id'");
            create_cache($cacheKey, '1', $this->config['skin'], "3600");
        }
    }

    public function getPosts($topic_id, $page = 1, $per_page = 20) {
        $topic_id = intval($topic_id);
        $per_page = intval($per_page);
        $offset   = (max(1, intval($page)) - 1) * $per_page;
        return $this->db->super_query(
            "SELECT p.*,
             u.name as username, u.foto as avatar, u.user_group, u.reg_date,
             u.forum_points, u.forum_post_count, u.forum_rank_id,
             r.title as rank_title, r.color as rank_color, r.icon as rank_icon
             FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts p
             LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = p.user_id
             LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_ranks r ON r.id = u.forum_rank_id
             WHERE p.topic_id = '$topic_id' AND p.is_deleted = '0' AND p.is_approved = '1'
             ORDER BY p.date ASC
             LIMIT $offset, $per_page",
            true
        );
    }

    public function countPosts($topic_id) {
        $topic_id = intval($topic_id);
        $r = $this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE topic_id = '$topic_id' AND is_deleted = '0'");
        return intval($r['c']);
    }

    public function addReply($topic_id, $text) {
        if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => 'Giriş yapmalısınız!'];
        if(!$this->canDo('reply_topic')) return ['error' => 'Yetkiniz yok!'];

        $topic_id = intval($topic_id);
        $topic    = $this->getTopicById($topic_id);
        if(!$topic) return ['error' => 'Konu bulunamadı!'];
        if($topic['is_locked'] && !$this->canDo('moderate')) return ['error' => 'Bu konu kilitli!'];

        $text    = trim($text);
        $user_id = $this->getUserId();
        $minLen  = intval($this->getSetting('min_post_length') ?: 10);

        // DÜZELTME: Uzunluk kontrolü HAM metinde yapılmalı
        if(mb_strlen(strip_tags(html_entity_decode($text, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'))) < $minLen) return ['error' => "Mesaj en az $minLen karakter olmalı!"];

        $flood_time = intval($this->getSetting('flood_time') ?: 30);
        $last_post  = $this->db->super_query("SELECT date FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE user_id = '$user_id' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1");
        if($last_post && (time() - strtotime($last_post['date'])) < $flood_time) {
            return ['error' => "Çok hızlı mesaj gönderiyorsunuz! $flood_time saniye bekleyin."];
        }

        $text_safe = $this->db->safesql($text);
        $ip = $this->db->safesql($_SERVER['REMOTE_ADDR']);

        $is_approved = $this->needsApproval($user_id) ? 0 : 1;
        $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts (topic_id, user_id, text, ip, date, is_approved) VALUES ('$topic_id', '$user_id', '$text_safe', '$ip', NOW(), '$is_approved')");
        $post_id = $this->db->insert_id();
        if(!$is_approved) return ['success' => true, 'post_id' => $post_id, 'pending' => true, 'message' => 'Mesajınız moderatör onayı bekliyor.'];

        $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET replies = replies + 1, last_post_id = '$post_id', last_user_id = '$user_id', last_post_date = NOW() WHERE id = '$topic_id'");
        $this->updateCatStats($topic['cat_id']);

        $this->addPoints($user_id, intval($this->getSetting('points_new_reply') ?: 2));
        $this->updatePostCount($user_id);
        $this->updateUserRank($user_id);

        $subs = $this->db->super_query("SELECT user_id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_subs WHERE topic_id = '$topic_id'", true);
        foreach($subs as $sub) {
            $this->sendNotif($sub['user_id'], 'reply', $topic_id, $post_id);
        }

        $this->sendNotif($topic['user_id'], 'reply', $topic_id, $post_id);
        $this->parseMentions($text, $topic_id, $post_id);
        
        clear_cache("forum_topics_" . $topic['cat_id']);
        return ['success' => true, 'post_id' => $post_id];
    }

    public function editPost($post_id, $new_text) {
        if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => 'Giriş yapmalısınız!'];
        $post_id  = intval($post_id);
        $post     = $this->db->super_query("SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE id = '$post_id' AND is_deleted = '0'");
        if(!$post) return ['error' => 'Mesaj bulunamadı!'];

        $own = $post['user_id'] == $this->getUserId();
        if(!$own && !$this->canDo('moderate')) return ['error' => 'Yetkiniz yok!'];

        $new_text = trim($new_text);
        if(mb_strlen(strip_tags(html_entity_decode($new_text, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'))) < 10) return ['error' => 'Mesaj çok kısa!'];

        // KRİTİK DÜZELTME: Eski metin DB'den ham gelse bile, yeni bir INSERT sorgusuna 
        // gömüleceği için MUTLAKA tekrar safesql ile escape edilmelidir. Aksi SQL syntax error verir.
        $old_text_safe = $this->db->safesql($post['text']);
        $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_edit_history (post_id, editor_id, old_text, date) VALUES ('$post_id', '" . $this->getUserId() . "', '$old_text_safe', NOW())");
        
        $new_text_safe = $this->db->safesql($new_text);
        $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET text = '$new_text_safe', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = '$post_id'");
        
        if($own) $this->logAction('edit_own_post', $post['topic_id'], $post_id);
        else $this->logAction('edit_post_as_mod', $post['topic_id'], $post_id);
        return ['success' => true];
    }

    public function deletePost($post_id) {
        if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => 'Giriş yapmalısınız!'];
        $post_id = intval($post_id);
        $post    = $this->db->super_query("SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE id = '$post_id' AND is_deleted = '0'");
        if(!$post) return ['error' => 'Mesaj bulunamadı!'];

        $own = $post['user_id'] == $this->getUserId();
        if(!$own && !$this->canDo('moderate')) return ['error' => 'Yetkiniz yok!'];

        $topic_id = intval($post['topic_id']);
        $topic = $this->getTopicById($topic_id);
        
        $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET is_deleted = '1' WHERE id = '$post_id'");
        $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET replies = GREATEST(replies - 1, 0) WHERE id = '$topic_id'");
        
        if($topic && $topic['last_post_id'] == $post_id) {
            $new_last = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id, user_id, date FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE topic_id='$topic_id' AND is_deleted='0' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1");
            if($new_last) {
                $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET last_post_id='{$new_last['id']}', last_user_id='{$new_last['user_id']}', last_post_date='{$new_last['date']}' WHERE id='$topic_id'");
            } else {
                $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET last_post_id='0', last_user_id='0', last_post_date=NOW() WHERE id='$topic_id'");
            }
            $this->updateCatStats($topic['cat_id']);
        }

        $this->logAction('delete_post', $topic_id, $post_id);
        return ['success' => true];
    }

    public function toggleLike($post_id, $type = 'like') {
        if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => 'Giriş yapmalısınız!'];
        $post_id = intval($post_id);
        $type    = ($type === 'dislike') ? 'dislike' : 'like';
        $user_id = $this->getUserId();

        $post = $this->db->super_query("SELECT user_id, topic_id, likes, dislikes FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE id = '$post_id' AND is_deleted = '0'");
        if(!$post) return ['error' => 'Mesaj bulunamadı!'];
        if($post['user_id'] == $user_id) return ['error' => 'Kendi mesajınızı beğenemezsiniz!'];

        $check = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id, type FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_likes WHERE post_id = '$post_id' AND user_id = '$user_id'");

        if($check) {
            if($check['type'] === $type) {
                $this->db->query("DELETE FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_likes WHERE id = '{$check['id']}'");
                $field = ($type === 'like') ? 'likes' : 'dislikes';
                $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET $field = GREATEST($field - 1, 0) WHERE id = '$post_id'");
                $counts = $this->db->super_query("SELECT likes, dislikes FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE id = '$post_id'");
                return ['status' => 'removed', 'type' => $type, 'likes' => intval($counts['likes']), 'dislikes' => intval($counts['dislikes'])];
            } else {
                $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_likes SET type = '$type' WHERE id = '{$check['id']}'");
                if($type === 'like') {
                    $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET likes = likes + 1, dislikes = GREATEST(dislikes - 1, 0) WHERE id = '$post_id'");
                } else {
                    $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET dislikes = dislikes + 1, likes = GREATEST(likes - 1, 0) WHERE id = '$post_id'");
                }
                $counts = $this->db->super_query("SELECT likes, dislikes FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE id = '$post_id'");
                $status = ($type === 'like') ? 'liked' : 'disliked';
                return ['status' => $status, 'type' => $type, 'likes' => intval($counts['likes']), 'dislikes' => intval($counts['dislikes'])];
            }
        } else {
            $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_likes (post_id, user_id, type, date) VALUES ('$post_id', '$user_id', '$type', NOW())");
            if($type === 'like') {
                $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET likes = likes + 1 WHERE id = '$post_id'");
                $this->addPoints($post['user_id'], intval($this->getSetting('points_received_like') ?: 5));
                $this->sendNotif($post['user_id'], 'like', $post['topic_id'], $post_id);
                $this->updateUserRank($post['user_id']);
            } else {
                $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET dislikes = dislikes + 1 WHERE id = '$post_id'");
            }
            $counts = $this->db->super_query("SELECT likes, dislikes FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE id = '$post_id'");
            $status = ($type === 'like') ? 'liked' : 'disliked';
            return ['status' => $status, 'type' => $type, 'likes' => intval($counts['likes']), 'dislikes' => intval($counts['dislikes'])];
        }
    }

    public function toggleFollow($topic_id) {
        if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => 'Giriş yapmalısınız!'];
        $topic_id = intval($topic_id);
        $user_id  = $this->getUserId();
        $check    = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_subs WHERE topic_id = '$topic_id' AND user_id = '$user_id'");
        if($check) {
            $this->db->query("DELETE FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_subs WHERE id = '{$check['id']}'");
            return ['status' => 'unfollowed'];
        } else {
            $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_subs (topic_id, user_id, date) VALUES ('$topic_id', '$user_id', NOW())");
            return ['status' => 'followed'];
        }
    }

    public function isFollowing($topic_id) {
        if(!$this->isLogged()) return false;
        $topic_id = intval($topic_id);
        $user_id  = $this->getUserId();
        return (bool)$this->db->super_query("SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_subs WHERE topic_id = '$topic_id' AND user_id = '$user_id'");
    }

    public function sendNotif($to_user, $type, $topic_id, $post_id = 0) {
        $to_user  = intval($to_user);
        $from_user = $this->getUserId();
        if($to_user == $from_user || $to_user <= 0) return;
        $dup = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_notifs WHERE user_id = '$to_user' AND from_user = '$from_user' AND type = '" . $this->db->safesql($type) . "' AND topic_id = '" . intval($topic_id) . "' AND date > NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR");
        if($dup) return;
        $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_notifs (user_id, from_user, type, topic_id, post_id, date) VALUES ('$to_user', '$from_user', '" . $this->db->safesql($type) . "', '" . intval($topic_id) . "', '" . intval($post_id) . "', NOW())");
    }

    public function getNotifs($user_id = null, $limit = 10) {
        $uid = $user_id ? intval($user_id) : $this->getUserId();
        return $this->db->super_query(
            "SELECT n.*, u.name as from_name, t.title as topic_title
             FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_notifs n
             LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = n.from_user
             LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t ON t.id = n.topic_id
             WHERE n.user_id = '$uid'
             ORDER BY n.date DESC LIMIT " . intval($limit),
            true
        );
    }

    public function countUnreadNotifs() {
        if(!$this->isLogged()) return 0;
        $uid = $this->getUserId();
        $r   = $this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_notifs WHERE user_id = '$uid' AND is_read = '0'");
        return intval($r['c']);
    }

    public function markNotifsRead() {
        $uid = $this->getUserId();
        $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_notifs SET is_read = '1' WHERE user_id = '$uid'");
    }

    public function markRead($topic_id, $post_id) {
        if(!$this->isLogged()) return;
        $topic_id = intval($topic_id);
        $post_id  = intval($post_id);
        $user_id  = $this->getUserId();
        $exists   = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_readlog WHERE user_id = '$user_id' AND topic_id = '$topic_id'");
        if($exists) {
            $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_readlog SET last_read_post = '$post_id', date = NOW() WHERE id = '{$exists['id']}'");
        } else {
            $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_readlog (user_id, topic_id, last_read_post, date) VALUES ('$user_id', '$topic_id', '$post_id', NOW())");
        }
    }

    public function isUnread($topic_id, $last_post_id) {
        if(!$this->isLogged()) return false;
        $topic_id = intval($topic_id);
        $user_id  = $this->getUserId();
        $log      = $this->db->super_query("SELECT last_read_post FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_readlog WHERE user_id = '$user_id' AND topic_id = '$topic_id'");
        if(!$log) return true;
        return intval($log['last_read_post']) < intval($last_post_id);
    }

    public function addPoints($user_id, $points) {
        $user_id = intval($user_id);
        $points  = intval($points);
        if($user_id <= 0 || $points == 0) return;
        $this->db->query("UPDATE " . USERPREFIX . "_users SET forum_points = forum_points + $points WHERE user_id = '$user_id'");
        $this->updateUserRank($user_id);
    }

    public function updateUserRank($user_id) {
        $user_id = intval($user_id);
        $user    = $this->db->super_query("SELECT forum_points FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE user_id = '$user_id'");
        if(!$user) return;
        $rank = $this->db->super_query(
            "SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_ranks WHERE points <= '" . intval($user['forum_points']) . "' ORDER BY points DESC LIMIT 1"
        );
        if($rank) {
            $this->db->query("UPDATE " . USERPREFIX . "_users SET forum_rank_id = '{$rank['id']}' WHERE user_id = '$user_id'");
        }
    }

    public function updatePostCount($user_id) {
        $user_id = intval($user_id);
        $cnt = $this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE user_id = '$user_id' AND is_deleted = '0'");
        $this->db->query("UPDATE " . USERPREFIX . "_users SET forum_post_count = '{$cnt['c']}' WHERE user_id = '$user_id'");
    }

    public function logAction($action, $topic_id = 0, $post_id = 0) {
        $mod_id   = $this->getUserId();
        $ip       = $this->db->safesql($_SERVER['REMOTE_ADDR']);
        $action   = $this->db->safesql($action);
        $topic_id = intval($topic_id);
        $post_id  = intval($post_id);
        $target   = $post_id > 0 ? 'post' : 'topic';
        $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_logs (mod_id, action, target_type, topic_id, post_id, date, ip) VALUES ('$mod_id', '$action', '$target', '$topic_id', '$post_id', NOW(), '$ip')");
    }

    public function reportPost($post_id, $reason) {
        if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => 'Giriş yapmanız gerekiyor!'];

        $post_id  = intval($post_id);
        $reason   = trim($reason);
        $user_id  = $this->getUserId();
        $reporter = $this->db->safesql($this->user['name']);

        if(mb_strlen($reason) < 5) return ['error' => 'Şikayet nedeni çok kısa!'];

        $dup = $this->db->super_query(
            "SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_complaint WHERE `from` = '$reporter' AND text LIKE '[FORUM]%' AND news_id = '0'"
        );
        if($dup) return ['error' => 'Bu mesajı zaten şikayet ettiniz!'];

        $post = $this->db->super_query(
            "SELECT p.topic_id, t.title, t.alt_name FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts p
             LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t ON t.id = p.topic_id
             WHERE p.id = '$post_id' AND p.is_deleted = '0'"
        );
        if(!$post) return ['error' => 'Mesaj bulunamadı!'];

        $raw_topic_link = $this->config['http_home_url'] . 'index.php?do=forum&action=topic&id=' . $post['topic_id'];
        // DÜZELTME: Ilk htmlspecialchars, SONRA safesql. Boylece DB'de okunabilir metin saklanir.
        $raw_complaint_text = "[FORUM] Mesaj ID: #$post_id | Konu: " . htmlspecialchars($post['title'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . " | Link: $raw_topic_link | Neden: " . htmlspecialchars($reason, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');

        $complaint_text = $this->db->safesql($raw_complaint_text);

        $this->db->query(
            "INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_complaint (news_id, `from`, text, date)
             VALUES ('0', '$reporter', '$complaint_text', NOW())"
        );

        return ['success' => true, 'msg' => 'Şikayetiniz iletildi.'];
    }

    public function getAttachments($post_id) {
        $post_id = intval($post_id);
        return $this->db->super_query(
            "SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_attachments WHERE post_id = '$post_id' ORDER BY id ASC",
            true
        );
    }

    public function getTopicAttachments($topic_id) {
        $topic_id = intval($topic_id);
        return $this->db->super_query(
            "SELECT a.*, p.date as post_date FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_attachments a
             LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts p ON p.id = a.post_id
             WHERE a.topic_id = '$topic_id' ORDER BY a.id ASC",
            true
        );
    }

    public function saveAttachment($post_id, $topic_id, $filename, $original_name, $filesize, $filetype) {
        $post_id       = intval($post_id);
        $topic_id      = intval($topic_id);
        $user_id       = $this->getUserId();
        $filename      = $this->db->safesql($filename);
        $original_name = $this->db->safesql(htmlspecialchars($original_name, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'));
        $filesize      = intval($filesize);
        $filetype      = $this->db->safesql($filetype);
        $is_image      = in_array(strtolower($filetype), ['jpg','jpeg','png','gif','webp']) ? 1 : 0;

        $this->db->query(
            "INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_attachments (post_id, topic_id, user_id, filename, original_name, filesize, filetype, is_image, date)
             VALUES ('$post_id', '$topic_id', '$user_id', '$filename', '$original_name', '$filesize', '$filetype', '$is_image', NOW())"
        );
        return $this->db->insert_id();
    }

    public function deleteAttachment($attach_id) {
        $attach_id = intval($attach_id);
        $attach    = $this->db->super_query("SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_attachments WHERE id = '$attach_id'");
        if(!$attach) return false;

        $user_id = $this->getUserId();
        $own     = $attach['user_id'] == $user_id;
        if(!$own && !$this->canDo('moderate')) return false;

        $filepath = ROOT_DIR . '/uploads/forum/' . $attach['filename'];
        if(file_exists($filepath)) @unlink($filepath);

        $this->db->query("DELETE FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_attachments WHERE id = '$attach_id'");
        return true;
    }

    public function incrementDownload($attach_id) {
        $attach_id = intval($attach_id);
        $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_attachments SET downloads = downloads + 1 WHERE id = '$attach_id'");
    }

    public function getStats() {
        $cached = dle_cache("forum_stats", $this->config['skin']);
        if($cached) return unserialize($cached);
        $stats = [
            'total_topics'   => intval($this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics WHERE is_deleted='0'")['c']),
            'total_posts'    => intval($this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE is_deleted='0'")['c']),
            'total_users'    => intval($this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE user_id > 0")['c']),
            'forum_members'  => intval($this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE forum_post_count > 0")['c']),
            'total_cats'     => intval($this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats")['c']),
            'total_likes'    => intval($this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_likes")['c']),
            'total_complaints' => intval($this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_complaint WHERE text LIKE '[FORUM]%'")['c']),
            'last_user'      => $this->db->super_query("SELECT name FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users ORDER BY user_id DESC LIMIT 1"),
            'last_post'      => $this->db->super_query(
                "SELECT p.id, p.date, u.name as username, t.title as topic_title, t.id as topic_id
                 FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts p
                 LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = p.user_id
                 LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t ON t.id = p.topic_id
                 WHERE p.is_deleted = '0' ORDER BY p.date DESC LIMIT 1"
            ),
        ];
        create_cache("forum_stats", serialize($stats), $this->config['skin']);
        return $stats;
    }
    
    // NOT: search() metodu kaldirildi. searchTopics() metodu kullaniliyor.
    // Iki ayni islevi goreni metod kafa karisikligi yaratirdi.

    public function sendPm($to_user, $title, $text) {
        if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => 'Giriş yapmalısınız!'];
        $from_user = $this->getUserId();
        $to_user   = intval($to_user);
        $title     = $this->db->safesql(trim($title));
        $text      = $this->db->safesql(trim($text));
        if($to_user <= 0 || $to_user == $from_user) return ['error' => 'Geçersiz alıcı!'];
        if(mb_strlen($title) < 2) return ['error' => 'Konu çok kısa!'];
        if(mb_strlen($text) < 5)  return ['error' => 'Mesaj çok kısa!'];
        $this->db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_forum_pm (from_user, to_user, title, text, date) VALUES ('$from_user', '$to_user', '$title', '$text', NOW())");
        return ['success' => true];
    }

    public function getPmInbox($user_id = null, $page = 1, $per_page = 20) {
        $uid    = $user_id ? intval($user_id) : $this->getUserId();
        $offset = (max(1, intval($page)) - 1) * intval($per_page);
        return $this->db->super_query(
            "SELECT pm.*, u.name as from_name
             FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_pm pm
             LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id = pm.from_user
             WHERE pm.to_user = '$uid' AND pm.del_receiver = '0'
             ORDER BY pm.date DESC LIMIT $offset, $per_page",
            true
        );
    }

    public function deletePm($pm_id, $by = 'receiver') {
        $pm_id = intval($pm_id);
        $uid   = $this->getUserId();
        if($by === 'sender') {
            $pm = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_pm WHERE id = '$pm_id' AND from_user = '$uid'");
            if($pm) $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_pm SET del_sender = '1' WHERE id = '$pm_id'");
        } else {
            $pm = $this->db->super_query("SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_pm WHERE id = '$pm_id' AND to_user = '$uid'");
            if($pm) $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_pm SET del_receiver = '1' WHERE id = '$pm_id'");
        }
        $this->db->query("DELETE FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_pm WHERE id = '$pm_id' AND del_sender = '1' AND del_receiver = '1'");
        return ['success' => true];
    }

    public function handleUpload($post_id, $topic_id) {
        if(empty($_FILES['forum_file']['name'][0])) return ['error' => 'Dosya seçilmedi!'];
        if(!intval($this->getSetting('allow_attachments'))) return ['error' => 'Ek dosya yükleme kapalı!'];
        $max_size    = intval($this->getSetting('max_attachment_size') ?: 5242880);
        $allowed_raw = $this->getSetting('allowed_filetypes') ?: 'jpg,jpeg,png,gif,webp,pdf,zip,rar';
        $allowed_ext = array_map('trim', explode(',', strtolower($allowed_raw)));
        $image_types = ['jpg','jpeg','png','gif','webp'];
        $upload_dir  = ENGINE_DIR . '/../uploads/forum/';
        $upload_url  = $this->config['http_home_url'] . 'uploads/forum/';
        
        if(!is_dir($upload_dir)) {
            mkdir($upload_dir, 0755, true);
            $htaccess_content = "<FilesMatch \"\.(php|phtml|php3|php4|php5|php7|cgi|pl|py|jsp|asp|sh)$\">\nOrder Allow,Deny\nDeny from all\n</FilesMatch>\nOptions -Indexes";
            @file_put_contents($upload_dir . '.htaccess', $htaccess_content);
        }
        
        $results = [];
        $files   = $_FILES['forum_file'];
        $count   = is_array($files['name']) ? count($files['name']) : 1;
        for($i = 0; $i < $count; $i++) {
            $tmp  = is_array($files['tmp_name']) ? $files['tmp_name'][$i] : $files['tmp_name'];
            $name = is_array($files['name'])     ? $files['name'][$i]     : $files['name'];
            $size = is_array($files['size'])     ? $files['size'][$i]     : $files['size'];
            $err  = is_array($files['error'])    ? $files['error'][$i]    : $files['error'];
            
            if($err !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK)  { $results[] = ['error' => 'Yükleme hatası: ' . $name]; continue; }
            if($size > $max_size)       { $results[] = ['error' => $name . ' çok büyük! Max: ' . round($max_size/1024/1024,1) . ' MB']; continue; }
            
            $ext = strtolower(pathinfo($name, PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
            if(!in_array($ext, $allowed_ext)) { $results[] = ['error' => $name . ': izin verilmeyen uzantı.']; continue; }
            
            $safe_name = time() . '_' . $this->getUserId() . '_' . bin2hex(random_bytes(4)) . '.' . $ext;
            $dest      = $upload_dir . $safe_name;
            $is_image  = in_array($ext, $image_types);
            
            if($is_image && function_exists('imagecreatefromstring')) {
                $src = @imagecreatefromstring(file_get_contents($tmp));
                if($src) {
                    $ow = imagesx($src); $oh = imagesy($src);
                    if($ow > 1920 || $oh > 1920) {
                        $r = min(1920/$ow, 1920/$oh);
                        $nw = intval($ow*$r); $nh = intval($oh*$r);
                        $ni = imagecreatetruecolor($nw, $nh);
                        if($ext === 'png') { imagealphablending($ni, false); imagesavealpha($ni, true); }
                        imagecopyresampled($ni, $src, 0,0,0,0,$nw,$nh,$ow,$oh);
                        imagedestroy($src); $src = $ni;
                    }
                    if(function_exists('imagewebp')) {
                        $safe_name = substr($safe_name, 0, strrpos($safe_name, '.')) . '.webp';
                        $dest = $upload_dir . $safe_name;
                        imagewebp($src, $dest, 82);
                    } else { 
                        imagejpeg($src, $dest, 85); 
                    }
                    imagedestroy($src);
                    $size = filesize($dest);
                } else { move_uploaded_file($tmp, $dest); }
            } else { move_uploaded_file($tmp, $dest); }
            
            $fe  = strtolower(pathinfo($safe_name, PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
            $att = $this->saveAttachment($post_id, $topic_id, $safe_name, $name, $size, $fe);
            $results[] = ['success' => true, 'id' => $att, 'url' => $upload_url . $safe_name, 'name' => $name, 'is_image' => in_array($fe, $image_types) ? 1 : 0];
        }
        return $results;
    }

    public function parseMentions($raw_text, $topic_id, $post_id) {
        preg_match_all('/@([a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]{2,30})/', $raw_text, $m);
        if(empty($m[1])) return;
        foreach(array_unique($m[1]) as $uname) {
            $us = $this->db->safesql($uname);
            $u  = $this->db->super_query("SELECT user_id FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE name='$us'");
            if($u) $this->sendNotif(intval($u['user_id']), 'mention', $topic_id, $post_id);
        }
    }

    public function bumpTopic($topic_id) {
        if(!$this->isLogged()) return ['error' => 'Giriş yapmalısınız!'];
        $topic_id = intval($topic_id);
        $topic    = $this->getTopicById($topic_id);
        if(!$topic)             return ['error' => 'Konu bulunamadı!'];
        if($topic['is_locked']) return ['error' => 'Kilitli konu bump edilemez!'];
        $uid = $this->getUserId();
        if($topic['user_id'] != $uid && !$this->canDo('moderate')) return ['error' => 'Sadece konu sahibi bump yapabilir!'];
        
        $row = $this->db->super_query("SELECT last_bump_date FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics WHERE id='$topic_id'");
        if($row && !empty($row['last_bump_date']) && $row['last_bump_date'] != '0000-00-00 00:00:00') {
            $cooldown = intval($this->getSetting('bump_cooldown_hours') ?: 24) * 3600;
            if((time() - strtotime($row['last_bump_date'])) < $cooldown) {
                $kalan = ceil(($cooldown - (time() - strtotime($row['last_bump_date']))) / 3600);
                return ['error' => "Bump için $kalan saat daha beklemelisiniz!"];
            }
        }
        $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET last_post_date=NOW(), last_bump_date=NOW() WHERE id='$topic_id'");
        $this->logAction('bump_topic', $topic_id, 0);
        return ['success' => true, 'message' => 'Konu yukarı taşındı!'];
    }

    public function moveTopic($topic_id, $new_cat_id) {
        if(!$this->canDo('moderate')) return ['error' => 'Yetkiniz yok!'];
        $topic_id   = intval($topic_id);
        $new_cat_id = intval($new_cat_id);
        $topic      = $this->getTopicById($topic_id);
        if(!$topic)                         return ['error' => 'Konu bulunamadı!'];
        if(!$this->getCatById($new_cat_id)) return ['error' => 'Kategori bulunamadı!'];
        $old = intval($topic['cat_id']);
        $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET cat_id='$new_cat_id' WHERE id='$topic_id'");
        $this->updateCatStats($old);
        $this->updateCatStats($new_cat_id);
        $this->logAction('move_topic', $topic_id, 0);
        clear_cache("forum_topics_" . $old);
        clear_cache("forum_topics_" . $new_cat_id);
        return ['success' => true];
    }

    public function needsApproval($user_id) {
        $threshold = intval($this->getSetting('approval_threshold') ?: 0);
        if($threshold <= 0) return false;
        $r = $this->db->super_query("SELECT forum_post_count FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE user_id='" . intval($user_id) . "'");
        return (intval($r['forum_post_count'] ?? 0) < $threshold);
    }
    
    public function getPendingPosts($page = 1, $per = 20) {
        $offset = (max(1,$page)-1)*$per;
        return $this->db->super_query("SELECT p.*, u.name as username, t.title as topic_title FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts p LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON u.user_id=p.user_id LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t ON t.id=p.topic_id WHERE p.is_approved='0' AND p.is_deleted='0' ORDER BY p.date DESC LIMIT $offset,$per", true);
    }
    public function countPendingPosts() {
        return intval($this->db->super_query("SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE is_approved='0' AND is_deleted='0'")['c']);
    }
    public function approvePost($post_id) {
        if(!$this->canDo('moderate')) return ['error' => 'Yetkiniz yok!'];
        $post_id = intval($post_id);
        $post = $this->db->super_query("SELECT * FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts WHERE id='$post_id'");
        if(!$post) return ['error' => 'Mesaj bulunamadı!'];
        $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET is_approved='1' WHERE id='$post_id'");
        
        $t = $this->getTopicById($post['topic_id']);
        if($t) {
             $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics SET replies = replies + 1, last_post_date=NOW(), last_user_id='{$post['user_id']}', last_post_id='$post_id' WHERE id='{$post['topic_id']}'");
             $this->updateCatStats($t['cat_id']);
        }
        $this->logAction('approve_post', $post['topic_id'], $post_id);
        return ['success' => true];
    }
    public function rejectPost($post_id) {
        if(!$this->canDo('moderate')) return ['error' => 'Yetkiniz yok!'];
        $post_id = intval($post_id);
        $this->db->query("UPDATE " . PREFIX . "_forum_posts SET is_deleted='1',is_approved='0' WHERE id='$post_id'");
        $this->logAction('reject_post', 0, $post_id);
        return ['success' => true];
    }

    public function pagination($total, $per_page, $current, $base_url) {
        if($total <= $per_page) return '';
        $pages = ceil($total / $per_page);
        $safe_base_url = htmlspecialchars($base_url, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        
        $html  = '<ul class="pagination pagination-sm no-margin">';
        if($current > 1) $html .= '<li><a href="' . $safe_base_url . '&page=' . ($current-1) . '">«</a></li>';
        for($i = 1; $i <= $pages; $i++) {
            $active = $i == $current ? 'class="active"' : '';
            $html  .= "<li $active><a href=\"{$safe_base_url}&page={$i}\">{$i}</a></li>";
        }
        if($current < $pages) $html .= '<li><a href="' . $safe_base_url . '&page=' . ($current+1) . '">»</a></li>';
        $html .= '</ul>';
        return $html;
    }
}
?>

<?php
if(!defined('DATALIFEENGINE')) die("Hacking attempt!");

// Forum ana sınıfını yükle
include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/classes/forum.class.php'));
 $Forum = new Forum($db, $member_id, $config);

// DÜZELTME: PHP 8 uyumluluğu. $_GET veya $_POST bir dizi (array) olma ihtimaline karşı is_string() kontrolü eklendi.
// Aksi takdirde strtolower() PHP 8+'de Fatal Error vererek siteyi kilitler.
 $raw_action = (isset($_GET['action']) && is_string($_GET['action'])) ? $_GET['action'] : 
              ((isset($_POST['action']) && is_string($_POST['action'])) ? $_POST['action'] : 'main');

// GÜVENLİK: Sadece küçük harf, rakam ve alt çizgiye izin ver (LFI/RFI koruması)
 $action = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_]/', '', strtolower($raw_action));

switch ($action) {
    case 'category':
        include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/actions/category.php'));
        break;

    case 'topic':
        include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/actions/topic.php'));
        break;

    case 'new_topic':
        include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/actions/new_topic.php'));
        break;

    case 'search':
        include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/actions/search.php'));
        break;

    case 'pm':
        include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/actions/pm.php'));
        break;

    case 'notifications':
        include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/actions/notifications.php'));
        break;

    case 'ajax':
        include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/actions/ajax.php'));
        break;

    case 'main':
    default:
        include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/forum/actions/main.php'));
        break;
}

<?php
if(!defined('DATALIFEENGINE')) die("Hacking attempt!");

function jout($data) {
    header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8');
    echo json_encode($data, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
    exit;
}

if(!$is_logged) jout(['error' => 'Giriş yapmanız gerekiyor!']);

 $token = isset($_POST['csrf']) ? $_POST['csrf'] : '';
 $token = $token ?: (isset($_REQUEST['user_hash']) ? $_REQUEST['user_hash'] : '');
 $act   = isset($_POST['act']) ? $_POST['act'] : '';

if(!$Forum->verifyCsrf($token)) jout(['error' => 'Güvenlik doğrulaması başarısız!']);

switch($act) {

    case 'like':
        $post_id = intval($_POST['post_id'] ?? 0);
        $ltype   = (isset($_POST['ltype']) && $_POST['ltype'] === 'dislike') ? 'dislike' : 'like';
        jout($Forum->toggleLike($post_id, $ltype));
        break;

    case 'follow':
        $topic_id = intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0);
        jout($Forum->toggleFollow($topic_id));
        break;

    case 'mark_read':
        $topic_id = intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0);
        $post_id  = intval($_POST['post_id']  ?? 0);
        $Forum->markRead($topic_id, $post_id);
        jout(['success' => true]);
        break;

    case 'notif_count':
        jout(['count' => $Forum->countUnreadNotifs()]);
        break;

    case 'notifs':
        $Forum->markNotifsRead();
        $notifs = $Forum->getNotifs($Forum->getUserId(), 15);
        jout(['notifs' => $notifs]);
        break;

    case 'edit_post':
        $post_id  = intval($_POST['post_id']  ?? 0);
        // PHP 8 ZIRHI: array gelirse Fatal Error
        $raw_edit_text = (isset($_POST['text']) && is_string($_POST['text'])) ? trim($_POST['text']) : '';
        jout($Forum->editPost($post_id, $raw_edit_text));
        break;

    case 'delete_post':
        $post_id = intval($_POST['post_id'] ?? 0);
        jout($Forum->deletePost($post_id));
        break;

    case 'lock_topic':
        $topic_id = intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0);
        $state    = intval($_POST['state']    ?? 0);
        jout($Forum->lockTopic($topic_id, $state));
        break;

    case 'pin_topic':
        $topic_id = intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0);
        $state    = intval($_POST['state']    ?? 0);
        jout($Forum->pinTopic($topic_id, $state));
        break;

    case 'send_pm':
        // DÜZELTME: PHP 8 dizi gönderimini engellemek için is_string() eklendi
        $to_name = (isset($_POST['to_user']) && is_string($_POST['to_user'])) ? trim($_POST['to_user']) : '';
        
        if(empty($to_name)) {
            jout(['error' => 'Geçersiz alıcı adı!']);
        }
        
        $to_row  = $db->super_query("SELECT user_id FROM " . USERPREFIX . "_users WHERE name='" . $db->safesql($to_name) . "'");
        
        if(!$to_row) {
            jout(['error' => 'Kullanıcı bulunamadı!']);
        }
        
        $title = trim($_POST['title'] ?? '');
        $text  = trim($_POST['text']  ?? '');
        
        jout($Forum->sendPm($to_row['user_id'], $title, $text));
        break;

    case 'delete_pm':
        $pm_id = intval($_POST['pm_id'] ?? 0);
        // DÜZELTME: Sadece 'sender' veya 'receiver' kabul edilmeli, diğer türlü veriler reddedilmeli
        $raw_by = (isset($_POST['by']) && is_string($_POST['by'])) ? strtolower(trim($_POST['by'])) : 'receiver';
        $by = in_array($raw_by, ['sender', 'receiver']) ? $raw_by : 'receiver';
        
        jout($Forum->deletePm($pm_id, $by));
        break;

    case 'new_topic':
        $cat_id = intval($_POST['cat_id'] ?? 0);
        $title  = trim($_POST['title']    ?? '');
        $text   = trim($_POST['text']     ?? '');
        jout($Forum->createTopic($cat_id, $title, $text));
        break;

    case 'delete_attachment':
        $attach_id = intval($_POST['attach_id'] ?? 0);
        jout($Forum->deleteAttachment($attach_id));
        break;

    case 'download_attachment':
        $attach_id = intval($_POST['attach_id'] ?? 0);
        $Forum->incrementDownload($attach_id);
        jout(['success' => true]);
        break;

    case 'bump_topic':
        $topic_id = intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0);
        jout($Forum->bumpTopic($topic_id));
        break;

    case 'move_topic':
        if(!$Forum->canDo('moderate')) jout(['error' => 'Yetkiniz yok!']);
        jout($Forum->moveTopic(intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0), intval($_POST['new_cat_id'] ?? 0)));
        break;

    case 'upload':
        jout($Forum->handleUpload(intval($_POST['post_id'] ?? 0), intval($_POST['topic_id'] ?? 0)));
        break;

    case 'approve_post':
        jout($Forum->approvePost(intval($_POST['post_id'] ?? 0)));
        break;

    case 'reject_post':
        jout($Forum->rejectPost(intval($_POST['post_id'] ?? 0)));
        break;

    default:
        jout(['error' => 'Geçersiz işlem']);
}
?>

' - Forum'; ?>

<?php
/*
=====================================================
 DLE Native Forum - Son Konular Bloğu
 Güvenlik ve Performans Optimizasyonu
=====================================================
*/
if (!defined('DATALIFEENGINE')) {
    die("Hacking attempt!");
}

// --- PARAMETRİK LİMİT ---
// Kullanım: {include file="engine/modules/forum_block.php?limit=12"}
// $_GET['limit'] DLE include mekanizması ile aktarılır.
// intval ile zorla integer yap, boşsa 5, bounds: 1-50 arası.
$limit = 5;

if (isset($_GET['limit'])) {
    $limit = intval($_GET['limit']);
}

if ($limit < 1) {
    $limit = 5;
}
if ($limit > 50) {
    $limit = 50;
}

// Cache key: skin + dil + limit kombinasyonu.
// Her limit değeri için ayrı cache — yanlış veri dönüşü yok.
$cache_key    = "forum_block_" . $config['skin'] . "_" . $config['langs'] . "_" . $limit;
$forum_block  = dle_cache($cache_key, $config['skin']);

if (!$forum_block) {
    $noavatar_path = $config['http_home_url'] . 'templates/' . $config['skin'] . '/dleimages/noavatar.png';

    $db->query("SELECT t.id, t.title, t.date, t.replies, u.name, u.foto, c.name as cat_name
                FROM " . PREFIX . "_forum_topics t
                LEFT JOIN " . USERPREFIX . "_users u ON t.user_id = u.user_id
                LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_forum_cats c ON t.cat_id = c.id
                WHERE t.is_deleted = '0'
                ORDER BY t.date DESC LIMIT " . $limit);

    $forum_block = "";
    $row_count   = 0;

    // Template'i döngü öncesi bir kez yükle
    $tpl->load_template('forum/forum_block.tpl');

    while ($row = $db->get_row()) {
        if (!is_array($row)) {
            break;
        }

        $row_count++;

        // XSS KORUMASI: Tüm kullanıcı verileri katı escape ile template'e aktarılır.
        $safe_title = htmlspecialchars($row['title'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');

        $safe_name    = isset($row['name']) && is_string($row['name']) ? htmlspecialchars($row['name'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') : 'Misafir';
        $safe_catname = isset($row['cat_name']) && is_string($row['cat_name']) ? htmlspecialchars($row['cat_name'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') : '';

        $safe_id      = intval($row['id']);
        $safe_replies = intval($row['replies']);

        // Tarih: strtotime başarısız olursa bugünün tarihi kullanılır
        $timestamp = strtotime($row['date']);
        if ($timestamp === false) {
            $timestamp = time();
        }
        $safe_date = langdate("j F Y", $timestamp);

        // Avatar: foto varsa onu kullan, yoksa default noavatar
        $safe_foto = isset($row['foto']) && is_string($row['foto']) && $row['foto'] !== '' ? $row['foto'] : '';
        if ($safe_foto !== '') {
            // Dosya yolu injection kontrolü: ../ veya baştaki / engellenir
            $safe_foto = ltrim($safe_foto, '/');
            if (strpos($safe_foto, '..') !== false) {
                $safe_foto = '';
            }
        }
        $avatar = ($safe_foto !== '') ? $config['http_home_url'] . "uploads/fotos/" . $safe_foto : $noavatar_path;

        $safe_link = $config['http_home_url'] . "index.php?do=forum&action=topic&id=" . $safe_id;

        $tpl->set('{title}', $safe_title);
        $tpl->set('{link}', $safe_link);
        $tpl->set('{author}', $safe_name);
        $tpl->set('{category}', $safe_catname);
        $tpl->set('{replies}', $safe_replies);
        $tpl->set('{date}', $safe_date);
        $tpl->set('{avatar}', $avatar);

        $tpl->compile('forum_block_content');
    }

    // Sorgu sonrası bellek temizliği
    $db->free();

    // Sonuç: En az bir kayıt bulunduysa compiled HTML'i al, boşsa sessizce geç
    if ($row_count > 0 && isset($tpl->result['forum_block_content']) && is_string($tpl->result['forum_block_content'])) {
        $forum_block = $tpl->result['forum_block_content'];
    } else {
        $forum_block = '';
    }

    // Template result'ı sıfırla — diğer modüllerle çakışmaz
    $tpl->result['forum_block_content'] = '';

    // Önbelleğe yaz
    create_cache($cache_key, $forum_block, $config['skin']);
}

echo $forum_block;
?>
